subject: feat(pdf): add print-friendly CSS, no-print utility, and page-break rules
body:
Brings PDF/print output in line with the glow-props reference pattern:
three simple pieces that make window.print() produce clean PDFs.

1. @media print rules in index.css:
   - White background, black text for printer-friendly output
   - print-color-adjust for accurate color reproduction
   - Link underlines for visibility on paper
   - Root container background override

2. .no-print utility class applied to:
   - App header, breadcrumbs, skip-to-content link
   - PWA install prompt, update/offline banners
   - PDF action buttons (generate, print, close)
   - Sticky save bar in module editor
   - Toast notifications
   - Mobile PDF hint text

3. .print-avoid-break class on PdfPreview:
   - Agreement header block
   - Each module section (title + content + signatures)
   - Verification code block
   - Prevents content from splitting across page boundaries

Also adds print: Tailwind utilities on PdfPreview text elements
to ensure readable black text regardless of screen theme colors.

Tags: pdf, print, ux, css
